name: fixturemint
description: Deterministic fixture pack generator for JSON Schema and local recipes.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js generate examples/user.schema.json --recipe examples/user.recipe.yaml --seed 42 --out fixtures/smoke && node dist/cli.js manifest fixtures/smoke --out fixtures/smoke-manifest.json
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
